name: enterprise-collab-notes-platform
description: Production-grade collaborative notes and knowledge management platform (MERN).

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
